primary_behavior: Conflict preservation: two applicable requirements cannot both be satisfied as written, and no approved exception or interpretation is supplied.

must_not_do: emit a strictest_recommendation — the obligations are not jointly satisfiable
merge the two requirements into one opaque status
silently prefer the contract over the policy, or the policy over the contract
invent an approved exception or interpretation

notes: 24-month retention and 12-month deletion are mutually exclusive for the same record category, and control_evidence shows approved_retention_exception and approved_interpretation are both null. The escalation must name the exact decision required: an approved interpretation, or an approved retention exception for WF-PARTNER-COMARKETING-007. Contrast with MCA-T10, where the two requirements ARE jointly satisfiable and a strictest_recommendation is expected.
